headline: Woman's 'Healing Era' Has Lasted 14 Months, Her Ex Is Now Married With Kids, She's 'Still Processing'
summary: Her vision board still has his face crossed out. The therapist has suggested moving on. She's 'considering it.'
fullBody: Amanda Healing has been 'in her healing era' for 14 months. Her ex is now married. With kids. A dog. A house. 'I'm still processing,' Amanda said. Her vision board has his face crossed out with a sharpie. Her therapist suggested 'moving on.' Amanda is 'considering it.' She has started a new board: 'New Era.' It looks exactly the same. The sharpie has been replaced with red paint.
